reply:
Here are your 3-day Hawaii travel options:

• **Green Choice**: 🌍 Hawaii 3 Days | **521 kg CO₂** | **$990** | **174 pts**
  ✈️ HA51 (SAF Eco-Flyer), 🏨 EcoNest Retreat (Solar), 🚗 Tesla Model 3 (EV)
• **Balanced Choice**: 🌍 Hawaii 3 Days | **694 kg CO₂** | **$876** | **116 pts**
  ✈️ UA362 (Hybrid Blend), 🏨 Green Haven Lodge, 🚗 Toyota Prius (Hybrid)
• **Standard Choice**: 🌍 Hawaii 3 Days | **1031 kg CO₂** | **$840** | **N/A**
  ✈️ DL329 (Standard), 🏨 Grand Plaza Resort, 🚗 Gas SUV

The Green Choice saves **515 kg CO₂** (50% less than Standard) for an additional **$150**.
